title: Fix admin panel error preventing access

requirements.text: Debug and resolve the error occurring in the admin panel that prevents the authenticated owner from accessing the admin dashboard, as indicated by the user's error report following Version 30 deployment

quotes: It is the error please fix it

acceptanceCriteria: The admin panel loads successfully when the authenticated owner navigates to /admin
No JavaScript errors occur in the browser console when accessing the admin panel
The AdminPanel component renders all sections including user identity, system statistics, and trending clips
The isCallerAdmin backend method returns true for the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae'

requirements.text: Review and fix the AdminPanel component (frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx) to handle any rendering errors that may cause the component to fail or display incorrectly
acceptanceCriteria: The AdminPanel component renders without throwing errors
All subsections (user identity, statistics, trending clips) display correctly
Loading and error states are handled gracefully
The component properly handles cases where backend data may be unavailable

requirements.text: Verify the admin route protection logic in frontend/src/App.tsx correctly evaluates the isCallerAdmin check and grants access to the AdminPanel when the backend returns true
acceptanceCriteria: The admin route displays the AdminPanel component when isOwner is true
The admin route does not get stuck in a loading state
Error states are properly handled and displayed to the user
Console logs clearly show the authentication flow and access decision

requirements.text: Fix the backend isCallerAdmin method in backend/main.mo to ensure it correctly authenticates the owner principal '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' and returns true, resolving any HashMap lookup or principal comparison issues
acceptanceCriteria: The isCallerAdmin method returns true when called by the owner principal
The adminPrincipals HashMap correctly stores and retrieves the owner principal
Backend logs confirm successful principal matching
No principal format mismatches or encoding issues occur

constraints: Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve existing authentication flow using Internet Identity
Keep the admin principals HashMap-based storage system
nonGoals: Changing the admin authentication mechanism from principal-based to user ID-based
Adding new admin panel features beyond fixing the current error
Modifying the visual design or layout of the admin panel
